titleStmt.title: SII 36.107: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 107. (A.R. No. 107 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: Records the grant of paddy by Puruchōthaman Naṅgaiyāṇḍi of Kāyākkuḍi in Paṉaiyur-nāḍu for the service of applying butter on the body of the deity as a protective coating and for bathing and also for the provision of sacred food offering during the days of Amāvāsi in the temple of Tirumāgāḷam-Uḍaiyar at Ambar in Ambar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Bhūvālakulavali-vaḷanāḍu, for the health of his mother Araiyan Uyāḷ. The five shepherds of Chiruvēḷūr in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Kulōttungachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu gave an undertaking to the temple authorities to supply the required quantity of butter to the temple. The grant also includes a provision for providing food to those visiting the temple during the days of Amāvāsi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi mīṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimannavarriyaluṟṟu
ḻitarat tikkaṉaittun tancakkara naṭātti vīrasiṅkāsanattu Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakecaripanmarāna tribhuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻadevarkku yā
ṇṭu 5 10tāvatu kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūr nāṭṭu ciṟuveḷūr Uṭaiyāṉ veḷān Irāmanāna cempiyan paṉaiyūr nāṭṭuk koṉum ciṟuveḷūr Uṭaiyān Ayana
piramaṉum ciṟuveḷūr Uṭaiyān Araiyan Uṭaiyāṉum ciṟuveḷūr Uṭaiyān Araiyan ponnamutanāṉa Utaiyamāttāṇṭa mūventaveḷānaṉum ciṟuveḷūr Uṭaiyān Uttama coḻan
pañcaṉativāṇaṉum Ivaṉaivom pūvālakulavali vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampart tirumākāḷam Uṭaiyār tribhuvana caṇṭecuvara tevakaṉmikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟuk kuṭutta paricāvatu In
nāṭṭuk kāyākkuṭi kāyākkuṭaiyāṉ taṉṉāl vempaṭikaṉṉān rājentracoḻa vātarāyar makaṉ purucottaman naṅkaiyāṇṭi tantāy Araiyan Uyāḷukku nanṟāka Uṭaiyār tirumākāḷam Uṭaiyārkku Amaā
vāsitoṟuñ ciṟappākat tiruveṇṇaikkāppuc cātti tirumañcaṇam Āṭi Aruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷa veṇṭuvanavaiyiṟṟukku Amāvāsi Onṟukku nel kalane patakkum Āpūrvikaḷāy vanta tevar Aṭiyārkku caṭṭi
ccoṟu pirasātañ ceytaruḷukaikku caṭṭi Onṟukku Arici Irunāḻiyāka caṭṭi nālukku Arici kuṟuṇikkum kaṟiamutu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvanavaiyiṟṟukku Amāvāsi toṟum nel patakku nān nāḻiyum Āka nellu kalane tū- (unfinished)
Digital edition of SII 36.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
